approaches.title: Greedy Linear Scan with Early Termination
approaches.summary: A greedy algorithm that tracks the farthest reachable index and current range to minimize jumps, with early termination when the end is reached.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial greedy implementation with boundary checks and early exit.

revisions.commitComment: this is actually jump game II, wrong name. anyw, more idomatic!

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Optimized by removing redundant length check and refining loop bounds with saturating arithmetic.
